name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
[Top Tier Original Order Denim Blue D] New Size]
Dio.r Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish item for posing♡ The exquisite embroidery craftsmanship perfectly presents it, adding a highlight to the outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini model is so cute8! The small bag shape is very convenient for holding small odds and ends~ Whoever uses it is stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high appearance.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Dimensions: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits 1 iPad Air 4 or 1 iPad Pro 11
